title: Golden Grilled Greek Lamb Skewers
description: A fresh and flavorful Greek dish featuring lamb skewers grilled to perfection, served with a side of sweet rice flour chapssalgaru, this meal is paleo-friendly and perfect for a weeknight dinner
instructions: Preheat the yakimono grill to medium-high heat
In a large bowl, whisk together olive oil, lemon juice, garlic, oregano, salt, and pepper
Add the lamb cubes to the bowl and toss to coat with the marinade
Thread the marinated lamb cubes onto skewers, leaving a small space between each piece
Grill the lamb skewers for 10-12 minutes, turning occasionally, until cooked to an internal temperature of 145 degrees
While the lamb is cooking, prepare the sweet rice flour chapssalgaru according to package instructions
Serve the grilled lamb skewers with a side of chapssalgaru and garnish with fresh parsley
Let the lamb rest for a few minutes before serving
